india_trends.title: Precious metals outlook: Is silver the better bet than gold right now? What are analysts saying
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver markets are consolidating, with gold around $4,750 and silver near $78. Analysts believe silver may outperform due to industrial demand and valuation dynamics, despite geopolitical tensions affecting both metals' prices.

india_trends.title: Hitachi Energy hits new high in weak market; IDBI Capital initiates 'Buy' - Business Standard
india_trends.summary: Hitachi Energy hits new high in weak market; IDBI Capital initiates 'Buy'    Business Standard

india_trends.title: Reliance Industries Q4 Results 2026 Preview: From O2C, Jio to Retail - here’s what to expect from Mukesh Ambani-led firm
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries Q4 Results Preview: Reliance is expected to report a muted earnings during the fourth quarter of FY26, led by weakness in the oil-to-chemicals (O2C) business and tepid retail segment growth. However, analysts expect Reliance Jio, the telecom arm, to report strong earnings growth.

india_trends.title: India’s private sector gains momentum in April on manufacturing strength
india_trends.summary: India's private sector activity gained pace in April. Manufacturing led the growth with increased output and new orders. Businesses expanded capacity and invested in technology. Companies built buffer stocks to manage supply chain uncertainties. Employment growth also picked up. Despite rising costs

india_trends.title: SW Solar Q4 Results: Cons profit surge 143% YoY despite 23% revenue decline
india_trends.summary: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy reported a 143% jump in Q4 net profit to Rs 135 crore, but revenue declined 23% year-on-year to Rs 1,946 crore, indicating improved profitability despite lower sales.

india_trends.title: NSE eyes MCX turf with market-making push for Brent futures
india_trends.summary: Late entrant to the commodity derivatives market, NSE plans liquidity scheme to build volumes in a market where MCX holds over 99% share.

ReNew to set up 6.5 GW solar facility in Andhra Pradesh with investment of Rs 4,500 crore
india_trends.summary: ReNew Energy is building a major solar manufacturing plant in Andhra Pradesh. The facility will produce solar ingots and wafers. This project represents a significant investment and will create many jobs. It is part of ReNew's larger commitment to the state. The plant is expected to be operational w

india_trends.title: Power demand spikes even before peak summer, seen at record high this year
india_trends.summary: India’s power demand has surged to nearly 240 GW amid an early, intense heatwave, nearing last year’s peak. With temperatures set to stay above normal, demand could hit record highs, testing grid capacity despite rising supply and preparedness by power utilities.

india_trends.title: Tata Teleservices Q4 Results: Co reports profit of Rs 581 crore vs loss a year ago
india_trends.summary: Tata Teleservices Q4 Results: Revenue from operations fell 4% YoY to Rs 296 crore.

india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty trade with sharp losses; PSU Bank shares drop    Business Standard

india_trends.title: Global Markets | European shares dip as investors weigh Mideast developments, corporate earnings
india_trends.summary: European shares edged ​lower on Thursday as escalating shipping concerns in the strategic Strait of Hormuz dampened investor sentiment, while market participants assessed a wave of corporate earnings reports.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei reverses below 60,000 level as profit-taking steps in
india_trends.summary: Japan's Nikkei share average reversed course on ​Thursday after briefly topping the ​60,000 level, as investors locked in profits from an early rally ​as the outlook of the war in the Middle East remained unclear.

india_trends.title: BFSI sector looks attractive across the board, says DSP Mutual Fund's Preethi RS
india_trends.summary: DSP Mutual fund manager Preethi RS sees a compelling entry point in the BFSI sector, citing healthy credit growth and recovering capital markets. Recent valuation corrections in large private banks, despite structurally lower growth, present attractive opportunities. Midcap banks also offer alpha po

india_trends.title: Tata Communications shares climb over 5% to hit 2-month high after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold?
india_trends.summary: On April 23, Tata Communications stock climbed 5.6% to ₹1,609 after a solid Q4 report showing 11.5% YoY data revenue growth. Despite a 65.44% drop in net profit, analysts upheld their positive ratings and target prices, citing strong order book and digital growth.

india_trends.title: Adisoft Technologies IPO fully booked on first bidding day, QIBs lead; check GMP, issue details
india_trends.summary: Adisoft Technologies IPO launched on April 23, priced between ₹163 and ₹172 per share. The offering includes 43.08 lakh fresh shares, primarily for capital expenditures. The IPO saw substantial demand, with a subscription status of 1.45x on day one.

india_trends.title: As Tech Mahindra chases margin and revenue milestones, cost-cutting alone may not suffice
india_trends.summary: With the turnaround journey reaching its final stretch, Tech Mahindra needs new efficiency levers beyond Project Fortius to offset rising AI investments and large-deal transition costs.

india_trends.title: BGR Energy Systems involvency plea: NCLT admits ₹584.67 crore default case, company plans appeal
india_trends.summary: As per the tribunal order, the total default amount considered is approximately ₹584.67 crore as on August 31, 2024, with June 30, 2022 marked as the date of default

Lululemon shares drop as new CEO appointment leaves investors unimpressed
Konica Minolta shares fall 6.7% after unveiling medium-term plan
Nokia shares jump 9% as AI ’supercycle’ drives surprise Q1 profit
Bank of America sees Brazil inflation risk premium narrow but remain elevated
The meme-stock craze is getting close to its post-Liberation Day extremes, according to JPMorgan
world_trends.summary: Analysts at the world’s biggest bank said crowding in meme stocks has approached close to the extremes reached after President Donald Trump imposed his ‘Liberation Day’ tariffs

world_trends.title: The good times roll for SK Hynix with record-breaking quarter, but living up to expectations isn’t easy
world_trends.summary: Having rallied 88% so far in 2026, even a record-breaking set of first-quarter numbers from SK Hynix struggled to impress traders.

world_trends.title: Analysts try to quell the panic after Taiwan Semiconductor said a high-end ASML machine was too expensive
world_trends.summary: There aren’t many customers for ASML’s multi-million-dollar machines, and one of them just drew a line in the sand.

world_trends.title: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall
world_trends.summary: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.

Vorwerk stock falls after Italian antitrust probe launched

Years after he auctioned it off, NSYNC singer Joey Fatone’s former mansion is on the market for $7.9 million
world_trends.summary: NSYNC star Joey Fatone’s former Florida mansion is on the market more than a decade after he was forced to auction off the property in a desperate bid to avoid bankruptcy.

world_trends.title: Texas Instruments topped Wall Street’s outlook on more than just data-center demand
world_trends.summary: Texas Instruments, one of the microchip makers most exposed to the manufacturing sector, raised its outlook after seeing strong demand from industrial customers as well as from the build-out of data centers.
